name: Classic Faux Wood Blinds
description: Durable, moisture-resistant faux wood blinds that give the warm look of real wood, ideal for kitchens and bathrooms.

name: Premium Aluminum Blinds
description: Slim, lightweight slats in a wide range of finishes for a clean, modern look in any room.

name: Vertical Blinds for Sliding Doors
description: Purpose-built vertical blinds sized for patio and sliding glass doors, with smooth side-to-side operation.

name: Cordless Blinds
description: A clean, cord-free lift system that's safer around kids and pets and looks tidier on the window.

name: Motorized Smart Blinds
description: App and voice-controlled blinds that open and close on schedule or on command.

name: Room-Darkening Blinds
description: Tight-fitting slats designed to block outside light for bedrooms, nurseries, and media rooms.

name: Genuine Wood Blinds
description: Real hardwood slats for a premium, natural look and feel that faux wood can't quite match.

name: Mini Blinds
description: Slim 1-inch aluminum slats: a classic, budget-friendly choice that fits neatly into smaller windows.

name: Two-Tone Decorative Blinds
description: Alternating light and dark slats add a subtle decorative pattern to any window.
